title: Adjective agreement and jaký
summary: Describe people and things with hard and soft adjectives, then ask what something is like.
objectives: Match adjective endings to masculine, feminine, and neuter nouns
Distinguish hard adjectives in -ý from soft adjectives in -í
Ask and answer questions with jaký, jaká, and jaké

sections.heading: Adjectives come before nouns
sections.body: Czech adjectives normally precede the noun they describe. Their endings agree with the noun's gender.

sections.heading: Hard adjective endings
sections.body: The dictionary form of a hard adjective ends in -ý. Use -ý with masculine singular nouns, -á with feminine singular nouns, and -é with neuter singular nouns.
examples: velký stůl / velká tabule / velké náměstí

sections.heading: Soft adjective endings
sections.body: Soft adjectives end in -í and keep -í with all three singular genders.

sections.heading: Asking what kind
sections.body: Jaký behaves like a hard adjective. Choose jaký for masculine, jaká for feminine, and jaké for neuter.
examples: Jaký je ten počítač? — Je starý.
Jaká je ta kniha? — Je stará.
Jaké je to auto? — Je staré.

sections.heading: Culture: Alois Jirásek
sections.body: Alois Jirásek was a Czech historical novelist and teacher. His Staré pověsti české retells Czech foundation legends and was adapted into a 1956 puppet film by Jiří Trnka.
examples: Staré pověsti české — Old Czech Legends

resources.title: Adjective endings
resources.note: Hard and soft singular adjective patterns.

resources.title: Asking what kind with jaký
resources.note: Gender agreement in questions and answers.

resources.title: Alois Jirásek and Old Czech Legends

exercises.explanation: Kniha is feminine, so a hard adjective uses -á: stará kniha.

exercises.prompt: Which question asks what the car is like?
exercises.explanation: Auto is neuter, so use jaké.

exercises.prompt: Type the feminine form of velký.
exercises.explanation: Hard adjectives use -á in the feminine singular.

exercises.prompt: Complete with the correct adjective: modern___ počítač.
exercises.explanation: Moderní is a soft adjective and keeps -í.
